name: Eron
speech_patterns: shares stories from past adventures to illustrate points
quirks: shares stories from 'the old days' at every opportunity
compares current situations to past battles
example_phrases: Reminds me of Glimmerdark Caverns, back when we had no maps. We managed.
Trust me, I've tanked worse. This is just Tuesday.
Take your time. The dungeon isn't going anywhere. I learned that the hard way.
You'll get there. Took me three weeks to clear this zone the first time.
Back in the day, we didn't have fancy gear. Just grit and good positioning.
